title: Two parallel plans unified into single linear plan; both predecessors archived
body: Owner-directed unification (2026-05-04). The two parallel plans authored earlier today — observability/current/eef-branch-merge-readiness.plan.md (mine) and architecture-and-infrastructure/current/smoke-test-retirement-recovery-and-completion.plan.md (Moonlit Shimmering Comet's) — had overlapping verification steps and made coordination harder than execution. Replaced by single unified plan: observability/current/feat-eef-exploration-completion.plan.md (17 linear steps, simple-comprehensive-straightforward per owner). Steps: (1) comprehensive plan review by 15 sub-agents, (2) apply findings preserving simple-linear shape, (3) integrate no-speed-pressure rule across RULES_INDEX + 3 adapters + principles cross-ref + distilled + 4 memory files, (4) reviewer backfill on commits fd4eabaa..b226670d, (5) apply backfill findings, (6-11) cycles 2a-2f per-workspace real-IO audits, (12) cycle 3a author no-real-io-in-tests ESLint rule, (13) cycle 3b wire rule into root config, (14) pnpm check green, (15) dev boot + MCP tool exercise via protocol + clean shutdown, (16) pre-merge divergence analysis, (17) owner-gated merge readiness with release-readiness-reviewer. Predecessor plans archived: observability/archive/superseded/eef-branch-merge-readiness.plan.superseded-by-unified-2026-05-04.md and architecture-and-infrastructure/archive/superseded/smoke-test-retirement-recovery-and-completion.plan.superseded-by-unified-2026-05-04.md. observability/README.md updated to point at the unified plan. Plan 2 (SENTRY_MODE rename) remains paused-superseded in observability/future/. Working tree dirty but coherent for owner-directed commit.
